articles.title: Search Underway for Missing Dog in Castleton
articles.excerpt: A 12-year-old Maltese dog has gone missing from Thornham New Road in Castleton, prompting a search by the family and local community.
articles.content_html:
A 12-year-old Maltese dog has gone missing from Thornham New Road in Castleton, Rochdale. The dog was last seen in the area, and her family is urging residents to check their sheds and gardens for any sign of her.

The family has expressed their desire to have the dog returned home safely. They have shared information about the dog's disappearance on social media to reach a wider audience.

Local residents are encouraged to keep an eye out and report any sightings to the family. The community's support could be vital in locating the missing pet.

Anyone with information regarding the dog's whereabouts is asked to contact the family directly.

articles.title: New Patio Project Begins in Castleton
articles.excerpt: A new patio project has commenced in Castleton on Hudson, NY, with initial assessments underway to ensure proper grading and planning.
articles.content_html:
A new patio project has started in Castleton on Hudson, NY. The project team conducted a final walkthrough before progressing further, noting the grade on the back side of the site.

The team is focused on ensuring that the project meets all necessary specifications and standards. Initial assessments are crucial for the successful completion of the patio.

As work continues, the team will monitor the progress closely to address any potential issues that may arise during construction.

articles.title: Shop Front Scheme Progresses in Castleton with Ten Applications Received
articles.excerpt: The shop front scheme in Castleton is advancing, providing design advice and support to local business owners. Ten applications for grants have been submitted so far.
articles.content_html:
A shop front scheme is progressing in Castleton, offering design advice and support to business owners interested in applying for available grants. The initiative aims to enhance the appearance of local shops and encourage investment in the area.

So far, ten applications have been received from business owners looking to benefit from the scheme. The support provided includes guidance on design and application processes, helping to ensure that the improvements align with the overall aesthetic of the community.

The scheme is part of ongoing efforts to revitalise Castleton and promote local businesses. By improving shop fronts, the initiative seeks to attract more visitors and enhance the shopping experience for residents and visitors alike.

Further updates on the scheme and its impact on the local business landscape are expected as more applications are processed and improvements are made.

articles.title: Free Vacation Bible Camp to be Held at Fellowship Bible Church in Castleton
articles.excerpt: Fellowship Bible Church in Castleton will host a free Vacation Bible Camp, providing local children with an opportunity for summer engagement and learning.
articles.content_html:
Fellowship Bible Church in Castleton will host a free Vacation Bible Camp this summer. The event aims to provide children in the local community with an engaging and educational experience.

The camp will include various activities designed to promote learning and fellowship among participants. It is open to children of all ages, encouraging families to take part in the community event.

Details regarding the specific dates and times of the camp will be announced soon, allowing families to plan accordingly. The church invites all interested families to participate in this opportunity.

Anyone with questions about the camp can contact Fellowship Bible Church directly for more information.

articles.title: St. Edmund’s Church in Castleton Dates Back to the 11th Century
articles.excerpt: St. Edmund’s Church, located in Castleton, has historical roots dating back to the 11th and 12th centuries, showcasing its significance in the area.
articles.content_html:
St. Edmund’s Church in Castleton has historical origins that date back to the 11th and 12th centuries. This church is a notable landmark in the area, reflecting the architectural and cultural heritage of the time.

The church has served the local community for centuries, playing a vital role in the spiritual life of Castleton.

Visitors to St. Edmund’s can appreciate its historical significance and the craftsmanship of its early architecture.

As a part of Castleton's heritage, St. Edmund’s Church continues to be a focal point for community events and gatherings.

articles.title: Northern Rail Services Continue at Castleton Station
articles.excerpt: Northern Rail services are operating as normal at Castleton railway station in Rochdale, following recent video footage showcasing various train classes passing through the station.
articles.content_html:
Northern Rail services are operating as normal at Castleton railway station in Rochdale. Recent video footage has captured several train classes, including the Class 150, Class 153, Class 156, and Class 158, passing through the station.

The videos, published on YouTube, highlight the activity at Castleton station, showcasing the different types of trains that serve the area. The footage dates back to October 2018, providing a glimpse into the station's operations during that time.

Castleton railway station is an important stop on the Northern Rail network, connecting passengers to various destinations across the region. The station continues to play a vital role in local transport, facilitating travel for residents and visitors alike.

articles.title: Weather Forecast for Castleton: July 16, 2026
articles.excerpt: The weather forecast for Castleton, Rochdale, on July 16, 2026, predicts a mix of sun and clouds with occasional rain showers expected. Temperatures are likely to reach a high of 20 degrees Celsius, while overnight lows may drop to around 12 degrees Celsius.
articles.content_html:
The weather forecast for Castleton, Rochdale, on July 16, 2026, predicts a mix of sun and clouds with occasional rain showers expected.

Temperatures are likely to reach a high of 20 degrees Celsius, while overnight lows may drop to around 12 degrees Celsius.

People should carry umbrellas as rain is expected intermittently throughout the day, particularly in the afternoon.

For those planning travel or outdoor activities, it is advisable to check for updates on weather conditions as they may change.
